title: Workloads
content:
# Workloads

This section manages the deployment of Assets for a Kelvin SmartApp™ to the edge from the App Registry in the Cloud.

This is a Developer tool and is documented in the [Developer Tools](../../../../developer-tools/how-to/deploy/deploy-workloads-deploy.md) section.
summary: This section manages the deployment of Assets for a Kelvin SmartApp™ to the edge from the App Registry in the Cloud. This is a Developer tool and is documented in the Developer Tools section.
